session.user:
Run prettier --write on the two files that have formatting issues: prettier --write docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md
Report the results.
session.assistant: I'll run prettier on those two files to fix the formatting issues.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run prettier --write on two markdown files

session.assistant:
prettier passed: Both files formatted successfully
**Files formatted:** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` (69ms) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` (26ms)
The formatting has been applied to both files.
